summary: Waiver authorization is current-HEAD-bound and focused tests pass, but merge authorization does not require or reconcile the waived target-gate list, leaving an audit and critical-gate consistency gap.
inspection_summary: Reviewed frozen HEAD 00014677d51664005b8cd0be5aa0a1f7aab078d3, Story/Architecture/registered Spec, merge authorization and execution call paths, changed tests, and current pr-prepare/verification evidence; ran focused authorization/E2E tests and matching CLI fixtures.
inspection_evidence: Focused authorization/E2E tests passed 6/6 and matching production CLI fixtures passed 5/5 at the inspected predecessor HEAD.
judgment_delta: Stale and missing-field rejection was established, but target-gate audit and critical consistency were not reconciled against current Gate state.

findings.detail: validateMergeGateOverride accepted an override without requiring unresolved_gates or reconciling the asserted empty critical list against current Gate state. Require valid target audit shape, reconcile target and critical IDs, fail closed on mismatch, and add omitted-target/conflicting-critical CLI fixtures.
